description: Sector overlay for French shipping, ports, vessel operations, maritime labour, safety, security, pollution prevention, and maritime transport documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Maritime and Shipping. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Maritime quality and safety framework
primary_sources.issuer: Ministry for the Sea / Maritime Affairs

primary_sources.name: French Maritime Affairs administration

primary_sources.name: French transport and maritime legal framework

rules.title: Vessel safety or navigation-safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for vessel safety, navigation safety, ship certificate, inspection, CROSS, rescue, or safety-management evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Maritime registration, authorization, or port-compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for vessel registration, port authorization, maritime permit, flag, customs/port formalities, or regulated-operation evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Marine pollution prevention or environmental-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for pollution prevention, waste, ballast, fuel, spill response, emissions, or marine-environment protection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: French maritime safety and environmental framework

rules.title: Crew training, seafarer, or maritime labour evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for seafarer qualification, crew list, training, medical fitness, safety drills, or maritime labour evidence.
